untranslatable_reason: Head-and-shoulders pattern detection requires multi-bar peak/trough identification and geometric relationship validation (shoulder heights, head dominance ratio, neckline symmetry). These pattern-specific structural conditions cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators (RSI, ATR, moving averages, etc.). Pattern recognition requires candlestick sequence analysis and relative peak/trough positioning that exceeds the scope of standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: Signal describes a complex candlestick pattern with strict geometric constraints. Partial approximation attempted using uptrend confirmation (price > sma_50) and volatility context (atr_14), but the core pattern validation logic (left shoulder > prior peak, head > shoulders by 1.0x shoulder height, neckline deviation ≤15%, right shoulder < head) requires dedicated pattern recognition algorithms not available in the indicator library. Recommend implementing custom pattern detection module outside this rules engine.
